# Contributing guidelines

## I have an idea for a new rule

Open an issue with your proposal. Make sure you elaborate on what problem it solves and include fail/pass examples.

## I have an idea for a new rule and I also want to implement it

First open an issue with your proposal. When the rule is accepted, see [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) for how to create and submit a new rule.

## I want to implement a rule from an open issue

See [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) for how to create and submit a new rule.

## How to write tests

See the [Testing section in `AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md#testing).
